line: Implemented the core semantic diff inspect/explanation surfaces.
- Added a structural inspect surface for normalized field diffs in `crates/membrain-core/src/engine/diff.rs:13` and `crates/membrain-core/src/engine/diff.rs:344`
- stable per-field explanations and summary text
- Extended `SnapshotDiff` to preserve subject labels for inspect summaries in `crates/membrain-core/src/engine/diff.rs:277`
- Added semantic-diff inspect/explain surface types in `crates/membrain-core/src/types.rs:434`
- Added stable explanation phrases per semantic diff category in `crates/membrain-core/src/types.rs:372`
- Added targeted tests for both new surfaces:
- I deliberately kept this to the conflict-free core layer because daemon/CLI inspect files were actively reserved by other agents.
- This lands the reusable inspect/explanation model those wrappers can consume next.
- The cleanest safe slice was to land reusable core inspect surfaces first, since runtime inspect wrappers are currently being edited by other agents.

items: The cleanest safe slice was to land reusable core inspect surfaces first, since runtime inspect wrappers are currently being edited by other agents.

line: - Using owned `String` fields in serde payload structs avoided deserialize lifetime issues from `&'static str`.

items: Using owned `String` fields in serde payload structs avoided deserialize lifetime issues from `&'static str`.

line: - Implemented inspect/explanation surfaces as reusable core methods (`inspect_surface`) rather than directly wiring daemon/CLI payloads.

items: Implemented inspect/explanation surfaces as reusable core methods (`inspect_surface`) rather than directly wiring daemon/CLI payloads.

line: - Preserved existing historical `SemanticDiff` artifact while adding a derived inspect view instead of changing stored diff semantics.

items: Preserved existing historical `SemanticDiff` artifact while adding a derived inspect view instead of changing stored diff semantics.

line: - Daemon/CLI inspect payloads still need follow-up wiring to consume these new core surfaces.

items: Daemon/CLI inspect payloads still need follow-up wiring to consume these new core surfaces.

line: - There are pre-existing unrelated warnings in `membrain-core` about unused imports in `brain_store.rs`.
